nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 海湾战争
nodes.summary: 海湾战争是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Socotra cormorant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Socotra cormorant
nodes.summary: Socotra cormorant（Socotra cormorant，学名 Phalacrocorax nigrogularis），分类上属于鲣鸟目，并归入鸕鶿科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于海湾战争，主要威胁包括污染、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 鸕鶿科
nodes.summary: 鸕鶿科（Phalacrocoracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Crowned cormorant、Reed cormorant、Little pied cormorant等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鲣鸟目
nodes.summary: 鲣鸟目（Suliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如白斑军舰鸟、麗色軍艦鳥、白腹军舰鸟等42种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: During the First Gulf War, images of badly oiled cormorants from the Gulf were regularly shown in the western media, and although the great cormorant is also found in the Persian Gulf, it is likely that many of these were Socotra cormorants

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Since 2000, this species has been listed as Vulnerable on the IUCN Red List, on the grounds of its small number of breeding localities and ongoing rapid decline. The decline is caused by coastal development, disturbance and marine pollution near its nesting colonies; in 2000 it was estimated that the world population was about 110,000 breeding pairs or 330,000–500,000 individual birds. The only protected nesting colony in the Persian Gulf is one of about 30,000 pairs on the Bahraini Hawar Islands off the coast of Qatar, and this is a Ramsar Convention listed site.Bahrain Bird Report

links.label: 受威胁于

The decline is caused by coastal development, disturbance and marine pollution near its nesting colonies; in 2000 it was estimated that the world population was about 110,000 breeding pairs or 330,000–500,000 individual birds.
